programme.desc: In Cornwall, George meets Abi and Morveth, who've sunk their life savings into a disused electrical substation. Can they turn this neglected shell into their home.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: A blood-soaked man walks out of a hotel lift holding a fire extinguisher, shouting that he's killed someone. Detectives try to work out what's happened.

programme.title: The Accused: Beyond Reasonable Doubt?
programme.desc: A 1992 suicide turns into a murder trial with Eddie Gilfoyle found guilty of killing his wife. Is the conviction safe and has Eddie run out of appeals.

programme.title: Taylor: A Story of Love
programme.desc: As Taylor Swift prepares to tie the knot, this documentary traces how the love life of the world's biggest pop star has influenced her music and her irrepressibly successful career.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sex toy tester Hayley wants the perfect partner to get her buzzing. And tree surgeon Dmitri is in for a big shock.

programme.title: Significant Other
programme.desc: Eerie sci-fi horror-thriller with Maika Monroe and Jake Lacy. Extra-terrestrial forces derail a couple's romantic backpacking trip, but in a subtle, non-spaceship kind of a way.

programme.title: Shiva Baby
programme.desc: Comedy-drama. A college student struggles to keep a lid on her secrets as she awkwardly encounters her sugar daddy and the ex-girlfriend she's still hung up on at a shiva.

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts
programme.desc: Bury Your Gays: Actor Grace doesn't understand why every role ends in death, until a mysterious agent reveals the Bury Your Gays trope. Can she survive the genre-hopping chaos.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bristol, the table talk ranges from romantic meetings to naked gardening, and the purple mash is more like Play-Doh, as Colin and Mandy, PJ and Owen, and joker Geoff and Gemma compete.

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie whips up super-speedy smashed lemongrass chicken, flavour-packed sweet potato chilli with homemade nachos, and a chocolate party tray cake with tinned mandarins and buttercream.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Jon Culshaw in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's certain that Rebecca's made a big mistake when she converts the bar's pool room into a genteel café serving tea. But Rebecca has a secret weapon.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla plots to win the Miss Boston Barmaid prize by being pleasant to all the judges, but when she realises Cliff is among them, she struggles to be nice.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's old baseball rival goads him into a final exhibition match, but Sam isn't too sure he wants to participate. Woody becomes fond of a stray dog.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tries to get to the front of the queue to meet the New York Mets 1969 'miracle' team at the Baseball Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray comes to regret asking Debra to give him more space in bed.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra go away for a romantic weekend but worry that they're boring. Back home, Robert babysits the kids.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's jealous when his depressed station manager finds more comfort in Martin's advice than Frasier's psychiatry. Niles and Daphne study yoga.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers find their social influence growing, thanks to a Russian backstreet caviar dealer.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Demonstrating how anybody can grow their own produce and plants anywhere - even on a balcony! This is how to bring nature and vegetables into your life wherever you live.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Kent: The Garden of England
programme.desc: In this episode we meet a man who swam the Channel 34 times, have a close encounter with the world's most venomous plant, and visit Chatham Dock Yards and the Isle of Sheppey.

programme.title: All-Inclusive Holidays: How to Get Your Money's Worth

programme.title: Cornwall: A Year by the Sea
